summary: Opt-in fallback: subprocess into adriankumpf/tesla_auth (if installed) and parse stdout for the refresh+access tokens.
reason: Some users prefer the native-window GUI flow tesla_auth ships. Detection via exec.LookPath is non-intrusive; only the explicit --via tesla-auth flag actually subprocesses. Surfaces a one-line stderr hint when tesla_auth is detected so users know the alternate path exists.
validated_outcome: 8 subprocess tests pass; canonical tesla_auth Display output parses correctly, malformed output rejected loudly, --debug log noise interleaving tolerated.
